goal: Require quality-gate self-protection and evidence fail-closed checks in CI.
authOracle: External alert delivery uses secret_manager or provider_specific credential references and fails closed when the secret name is missing; no new authenticated route is introduced.
apiCompatibilitySummary: Public API unchanged; this PR changes evidence automation scripts and tests only.
splitReason: Quality-gate requiredization and provider-safe deployment evidence hardening are deferred to the next PR.
reasoningEvidence: Plan-first scope separates alert provider boundary, dry-run, manual apply gate, credential fail-closed checks, payload safety, rollback plan, docs, and quality evidence.
verificationOracle: Local typecheck and tests verify alert delivery plan, provider boundaries, dry-run/apply gate, credential failure, payload safety, provider error mapping, and rollback plan; GitHub CI and quality-gate verify pushed head.
storageOracle: No DB migration or storage format change in this PR.
releaseGateOracle: Evidence tooling only; no production runtime readiness claimed.
